items.title: Stripe Benchmark Shows AI Agents Build Integrations but Struggle with Validation
items.summaryShort: Stripe Benchmark Shows AI Agents Build Integrations but Struggle with Validation. Stripe introduces a benchmark suite to evaluate whether AI agents can build real-world Stripe integrations across backend, frontend, and browser-based checkou

items.title: Presentation: Postgres for Production Agents: Your Relational Foundation for Enterprise AI
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Postgres for Production Agents: Your Relational Foundation for Enterprise AI. Gwen Shapira shares how teams are scaling AI features using PostgreSQL for mission-critical apps.

items.title: Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks Extension Connects VS Code to Google Cloud's Jupyter Notebooks
items.summaryShort: Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks Extension Connects VS Code to Google Cloud's Jupyter Notebooks. The Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks extension for VS Code is a new tool that enables developers to connect their local IDE directly to managed

items.title: Google and Industry Partners Announce Agentic Resource Discovery Specification for AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Google and Industry Partners Announce Agentic Resource Discovery Specification for AI Agents. Google and industry partners announced Agentic Resource Discovery (ARD) Specification, an open standard for publishing, discovering, and verifying

items.title: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more
items.summaryShort: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more. By keeping the number of investments to about 25 per fund, Greylock aims to remain what it calls "the most important partner" to its founders.

items.title: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
items.summaryShort: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic. Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.

items.title: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms
items.summaryShort: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms. The safety board confirmed Tesla's account of the crash, which the company shared days after it happened last month.
